Jobber Name:{{ doc.supplier_name }}
Address:{% if s_addr %}{{ s_addr.address_line1 or '' }}, {{ s_addr.city or '' }}{% else %}{{ doc.supplier_address or '' }}{% endif %}

Party GSTIN:{{ s_addr.gstin if (s_addr and s_addr.gstin) else '' }}
